mapper.select: SELECT ssd.*, ssg.seller_name, ssg.goods_title, ssg.goods_pic_url, ssg.goods_url, ssg.goods_price, su.seller_counselor_name FROM store_sell_detail ssd LEFT JOIN store_seller_goods ssg ON ssd.goods_id = ssg.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON su.id = ssg.seller_id where ssd.celebrity_private_id = #{storeSellDetailModel.celebrityPrivateId}

SELECT spgc.id, scp.account, scp.like_tags, scp.gender, scp.platform_type, scp.id AS celebrity_id, spgc.full_address, spgc.prom_id, spgc.goods_id, spgc.goods_waybill, spgc.media_img_json, spgc.media_uploads, spgc.remark, spgc.goods_carrier, spgc.celebrity_prom_status, spgc.append_goods_amount, ssp.payment_amount FROM store_celebrity_private scp LEFT JOIN store_promotion_goods_celebrity spgc ON scp.id = spgc.celebrity_private_id left join store_seller_promotion ssp on ssp.extension_code = spgc.extension_code WHERE spgc.goods_id = #{goodsId} AND scp.id IN (SELECT celebrity_private_id FROM `store_promotion_goods_celebrity` WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId})

SELECT ssp.seller_name, ssp.product_brand, ssp.currency_symbol, scp.account, scp.avatar_url, scp.like_avg_num, spgc.video_tags, scp.interact_avg_num, scp.play_avg_num, scp.video_count, scp.like_count, spgc.prom_like_tags, scp.platform_type, scp.followers_num, spgc.prom_price, qn.qr_code AS qrCode, qn.nickname, qn.phone, scp.country_name FROM store_seller_promotion AS ssp LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM store_promotion_goods_celebrity WHERE is_del = 0) spgc ON spgc.prom_id = ssp.id LEFT JOIN store_celebrity_private scp ON spgc.celebrity_private_id = scp.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT ssu.id, su.id sid, su.qr_code, su.nickname, su.username, su.phone FROM sys_user AS su LEFT JOIN sys_user AS ssu ON su.id = ssu.seller_counselor_id WHERE su.user_type = 3 AND su.nickname != '' AND ssu.username != '') qn ON ssp.seller_id = qn.id WHERE prom_id = #{promId} AND spgc.celebrity_status = 0

SELECT CASE platform_type WHEN 0 THEN 'Instagram' WHEN 1 THEN 'YouTube' WHEN 2 THEN 'TikTok' ELSE 'Other' END AS platform, COUNT(*) AS count, ROUND(COUNT(*) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store_celebrity_private) * 100, 2) AS percentage FROM store_celebrity_private GROUP BY platform_type;

SELECT CASE scp.platform_type WHEN 0 THEN 'Instagram' WHEN 1 THEN 'YouTube' WHEN 2 THEN 'TikTok' ELSE 'Other' END AS platformName, st.like_tag_name AS categoryName,
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN scp.is_top_star = #{item.itemValue} THEN scp.id END) AS "${item.remark}" , COUNT(DISTINCT scp.id) AS totalCelebrityCount FROM store_celebrity_private scp JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS n UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 ) numbers ON CHAR_LENGTH(scp.like_tags) - CHAR_LENGTH(REPLACE(scp.like_tags, ',', '')) >= numbers.n - 1 JOIN store_tags st ON st.like_tag_name = TRIM( SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(scp.like_tags, ',', numbers.n), ',', -1) ) WHERE scp.like_tags IS NOT NULL AND scp.like_tags != ''
AND scp.platform_type = #{platformType}
GROUP BY scp.platform_type, st.like_tag_name ORDER BY platformName, totalCelebrityCount DESC
